headline: Crown Castle Refocuses On Towers As Fiber Sale Targets Debt And Margins
summary: Crown Castle (NYSE:CCI) plans to sell its small cell and fiber businesses in the second half of 2026. The company is targeting lower leverage and higher EBITDA margins through this divestiture. The move would narrow Crown Castle’s focus toward its remaining wireless infrastructure operations. Crown Castle runs a large portfolio of wireless infrastructure that supports mobile carriers and data traffic across the US. By planning to exit small cell and fiber, NYSE:CCI is signaling a tighter...

headline: Is Crown Castle (CCI) Pricing Reflect Its DCF Upside After Recent Share Price Stability
summary: If you are wondering whether Crown Castle's share price around US$90.43 still reflects its real worth, you are not alone. This article walks through what the current market price might be implying about its value. Over the past week the stock returned 1.0%, with a 5.0% return over the last 30 days, while the year to date return is 2.0% and the 1 year return sits at a 2.7% decline, set against a 15.9% decline over 3 years and a 28.8% decline over 5 years. Recent coverage of Crown Castle has...
